creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
Hi,

What happened here?

Maintainer gives positive feedback.

dev@dudu.ro 2019-07-02 17:03:09 CEST
Flags: maintainer-feedback?(dev@dudu.ro) → maintainer-feedback+

Mr Kocak moves the positive feedback to the (probably more appropriate) approval of the attachment.

Kubilay Kocak 2019-07-02 17:05:42 CEST
Flags: maintainer-feedback+ -> Attachment #205477 - Flags: maintainer-approval+

Mr Knoblich than removes this approval.

Kai Knoblich 2019-07-02 17:24:22 CEST
Attachment #205477 - Flags: maintainer-approval+ → maintainer-approval?(dev@dudu.ro)

Why? Does the maintainer need to approve again? Was something unclear?
To me, this looks like more work for more people for something really small.
